speaker: speaker1
text: Why don't you sit down and relax , darling ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , come over and talk to me then .

speaker: speaker1
text: May I turn on the TV then ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Turn on the TV for what ?

speaker: speaker1
text: So that we can sit down together and listen to some music .

speaker: speaker2
text: Listen to the music ? And who will cook dinner , will you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I will , but let's go to the disco after dinner .

speaker: speaker2
text: To a disco ? Oh , no . You know I hate it .
